results.description: TO WILL DEVELOP A SHORE INFRASTRUCTURE PLAN TO VALIDATE BASIC FACILITY REQUIREMENTS, PROPOSE AN INFRASTRUCTURE INVESTMENT STRATEGY, AND RECOMMEND PLANNING ACTIONS NEEDED SUPPORT CURRENT AND PROJECTED SMALL UNMANNED SURFACE VESSELS OPERATIONS.
